title: AI for Business
summary: AI concepts and practical applications for business leaders.
description: A managerial introduction to artificial intelligence focused on use-case selection, business value, operating implications, risk and implementation choices.
audience: Managers, analysts, consultants and business students who need to evaluate and lead AI-enabled initiatives.
prerequisites: No programming prerequisite. Familiarity with business processes is expected.
outcomes: Explain major AI capabilities in business terms.
Identify and prioritise viable business use cases.
Evaluate data, technology and organisational readiness.
Assess value, risk and implementation alternatives.
Develop a practical AI adoption roadmap.

modules.title: Understanding AI in business
modules.description: Capabilities, limitations and the evolving business landscape.

modules.title: Use-case discovery and prioritisation
modules.description: Value pools, feasibility and portfolio choices.

modules.title: Generative and autonomous AI applications
modules.description: Business workflows, human oversight and performance.

modules.title: Implementation roadmap
modules.description: Governance, change, measurement and continuous improvement.
